#Cell 1: Imports & Spark Session
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, to_timestamp, to_date, upper, trim, lit, current_timestamp

# Optional: tune Spark shuffle partitions
spark.conf.set("spark.sql.shuffle.partitions", "8")

#Cell 2: Define Storage Paths
storage_account = "saazurepractice077"
bronze_path = "abfss://sourcedata@saazurepractice077.dfs.core.windows.net/bronze/"
silver_path = "abfss://sourcedata@saazurepractice077.dfs.core.windows.net/Silver/"

#Cell 3: Read Bronze CSV Files
def read_csv(path, file_name):
    return spark.read.option("header", True).option("inferSchema", True).csv(f"{path}/{file_name}")

df_patients = read_csv(bronze_path, "patients.csv")
df_admissions = read_csv(bronze_path, "admissions.csv")
df_diagnoses = read_csv(bronze_path, "diagnoses_icd.csv")
df_icd = read_csv(bronze_path, "d_icd_diagnoses.csv")
df_insurance = read_csv(bronze_path, "insurance.csv")
df_doctors = read_csv(bronze_path, "doctors.csv")
df_departments = read_csv(bronze_path, "departments.csv")

print("All Bronze files loaded successfully!")

#Cell 4: Data Validation
# Validate required columns

def validate_required_columns(df, required_columns, df_name):
    missing = [c for c in required_columns if c not in df.columns]
    print(f"{df_name} missing columns: {missing if missing else 'None ✅'}")

validate_required_columns(df_patients, ["subject_id", "gender", "anchor_age", "anchor_year"], "Patients")
validate_required_columns(df_admissions, ["hadm_id", "subject_id", "admittime", "dischtime"], "Admissions")
validate_required_columns(df_diagnoses, ["hadm_id", "icd_code"], "Diagnoses")
validate_required_columns(df_insurance, ["age", "charges"], "Insurance")
validate_required_columns(df_doctors, ["doctor_id", "doctor_name", "active_flag"], "Doctors")
validate_required_columns(df_departments, ["department_id", "department_name", "active_flag"], "Departments")

# Null & Duplicate checks
print(f"Patients null subject_id: {df_patients.filter(col('subject_id').isNull()).count()}")
print(f"Admissions null hadm_id: {df_admissions.filter(col('hadm_id').isNull()).count()}")
print(f"Insurance negative charges: {df_insurance.filter(col('charges') < 0).count()}")
print(f"Doctors invalid active_flag: {df_doctors.filter(~col('active_flag').isin(['Y','N'])).count()}")
print(f"Departments invalid active_flag: {df_departments.filter(~col('active_flag').isin(['Y','N'])).count()}")

print(f"Duplicate patients: {df_patients.count() - df_patients.dropDuplicates(['subject_id']).count()}")
print(f"Duplicate admissions: {df_admissions.count() - df_admissions.dropDuplicates(['hadm_id']).count()}")
print(f"Duplicate doctors: {df_doctors.count() - df_doctors.dropDuplicates(['doctor_id']).count()}")
print(f"Duplicate departments: {df_departments.count() - df_departments.dropDuplicates(['department_id']).count()}")

print("✅ Validation complete!")

#Cell 5: Clean & Transform Data
# Patients
df_patients_clean = (
    df_patients
    .withColumnRenamed("subject_id", "patient_id")
    .withColumn("gender", upper(trim(col("gender"))))
    .withColumn("anchor_age", col("anchor_age").cast("int"))
    .withColumn("anchor_year", col("anchor_year").cast("int"))
    .dropDuplicates(["patient_id"])
    .filter(col("patient_id").isNotNull())
)

# Admissions
df_admissions_clean = (
    df_admissions
    .withColumnRenamed("hadm_id", "visit_id")
    .withColumn("admittime", to_timestamp(col("admittime")))
    .withColumn("dischtime", to_timestamp(col("dischtime")))
    .withColumn("visit_date", to_date(col("admittime")))
    .dropDuplicates(["visit_id"])
    .filter(col("visit_id").isNotNull() & col("admittime").isNotNull())
)

# Insurance
df_insurance_clean = (
    df_insurance
    .withColumnRenamed("charges", "total_amount")
    .withColumn("total_amount", col("total_amount").cast("double"))
    .withColumn("age", col("age").cast("int"))
    .withColumn("bmi", col("bmi").cast("double"))
    .filter(col("total_amount") >= 0)
)

# Doctors
df_doctors_clean = (
    df_doctors
    .withColumn("doctor_name", trim(col("doctor_name")))
    .withColumn("active_flag", upper(trim(col("active_flag"))))
    .withColumn("experience_years", col("experience_years").cast("int"))
    .withColumn("joining_date", to_date(col("joining_date"), "M/d/yyyy"))
    .dropDuplicates(["doctor_id"])
    .filter(col("doctor_id").isNotNull())
)

# Departments
df_departments_clean = (
    df_departments
    .withColumn("department_name", trim(col("department_name")))
    .withColumn("active_flag", upper(trim(col("active_flag"))))
    .dropDuplicates(["department_id"])
    .filter(col("department_id").isNotNull())
)

print("✅ All datasets cleaned successfully!")

#Cell 6: Join Datasets for Silver Layer
# Join admissions with patients
df_visits = df_admissions_clean.join(
    df_patients_clean,
    df_admissions_clean["subject_id"] == df_patients_clean["patient_id"],
    "left"
)

# Primary diagnosis per visit
df_primary_diagnosis = (
    df_diagnoses
    .filter(col("seq_num") == 1)
    .select("hadm_id", "icd_code")
    .withColumnRenamed("hadm_id", "hadm_id_diag")
    .withColumnRenamed("icd_code", "primary_icd_code")
)

df_visits = df_visits.join(
    df_primary_diagnosis,
    df_visits["visit_id"] == df_primary_diagnosis["hadm_id_diag"],
    "left"
)

# Join ICD descriptions
df_visits = df_visits.join(
    df_icd.select(
        col("icd_code").alias("icd_ref_code"),
        col("long_title").alias("diagnosis_description")
    ),
    df_visits["primary_icd_code"] == col("icd_ref_code"),
    "left"
).drop("hadm_id_diag", "icd_ref_code")

# Diagnoses
df_diagnoses_clean = (
    df_diagnoses
    .withColumn("icd_code", trim(col("icd_code")))
    .withColumn("icd_version", col("icd_version").cast("int"))
    .dropDuplicates(["subject_id", "hadm_id", "icd_code"])
    .filter(col("subject_id").isNotNull())
)

# ICD Descriptions
df_icd_clean = (
    df_icd
    .withColumn("icd_code", trim(col("icd_code")))
    .withColumn("long_title", trim(col("long_title")))
    .dropDuplicates(["icd_code", "icd_version"])
)

print(f"Joined visits dataset: {df_visits.count()} rows")

df_visits.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(f"{silver_path}/visits/")
df_patients_clean.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(f"{silver_path}/patients/")
df_doctors_clean.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(f"{silver_path}/doctors/")
df_departments_clean.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(f"{silver_path}/departments/")
df_insurance_clean.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(f"{silver_path}/billing/")
df_diagnoses_clean.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(f"{silver_path}/diagnoses/")

print("✅ Silver layer saved successfully in PARQUET format!")

from pyspark.sql.functions import monotonically_increasing_id, current_date, lit, year, month, dayofmonth, quarter, date_format, col, current_timestamp, max as spark_max
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType, TimestampType

# Define Silver and Gold storage paths
silver_path = "abfss://sourcedata@saazurepractice077.dfs.core.windows.net/Silver/"
gold_path = "abfss://sourcedata@saazurepractice077.dfs.core.windows.net/Gold/"


df_silver_visits = spark.read.parquet(f"{silver_path}/visits/")
df_silver_patients = spark.read.parquet(f"{silver_path}/patients/")
df_silver_doctors = spark.read.parquet(f"{silver_path}/doctors/")
df_silver_departments = spark.read.parquet(f"{silver_path}/departments/")
df_silver_billing = spark.read.parquet(f"{silver_path}/billing/")

print("✅ Silver tables loaded successfully!")

from pyspark.sql.functions import col, year, month, dayofmonth, row_number
from pyspark.sql.window import Window

# Define Silver and Gold storage paths
silver_path = "abfss://sourcedata@saazurepractice077.dfs.core.windows.net/Silver/"
gold_path = "abfss://sourcedata@saazurepractice077.dfs.core.windows.net/Gold/"

final_df = spark.read.option("header",True).csv("silver_path")

# ================================
# Window for surrogate keys
# ================================
window_spec = Window.orderBy("subject_id")

# ================================
# DIM PATIENT
# ================================
dim_patient = final_df.select(
        col("subject_id"),
        col("gender"),
        col("anchor_age")
    ) \
    .dropDuplicates() \
    .withColumn("patient_key", row_number().over(window_spec))

print("========== CREATING DIM_PATIENT ==========")

df_dim_patient = df_silver_patients \
    .select("patient_id", "gender", "anchor_age", "anchor_year") \
    .withColumn("patient_sk", monotonically_increasing_id()) \
    .withColumn("effective_from", current_date()) \
    .withColumn("effective_to", lit(None).cast("date")) \
    .withColumn("is_current", lit("Y"))

print(f"Dim_Patient: {df_dim_patient.count()} rows")
df_dim_patient.write.mode("overwrite").csv(f"{gold_path}/dim_patient/")

print("========== CREATING DIM_DOCTOR ==========")

df_dim_doctor = df_silver_doctors \
    .select("doctor_id", "doctor_name", "specialization", 
            "experience_years", "qualification", "joining_date", 
            "city", "active_flag") \
    .withColumn("doctor_sk", monotonically_increasing_id()) \
    .withColumn("effective_from", current_date()) \
    .withColumn("effective_to", lit(None).cast("date")) \
    .withColumn("is_current", lit("Y"))

print(f"Dim_Doctor: {df_dim_doctor.count()} rows")
df_dim_doctor.write.mode("overwrite").csv(f"{gold_path}/dim_doctor/")

print("========== CREATING DIM_DEPARTMENT ==========")

df_dim_department = df_silver_departments \
    .select("department_id", "department_name", "department_head",
            "floor_number", "building", "active_flag") \
    .withColumn("department_sk", monotonically_increasing_id())

print(f"Dim_Department: {df_dim_department.count()} rows")
df_dim_department.write.mode("overwrite").csv(f"{gold_path}/dim_department/")

print("========== CREATING DIM_DIAGNOSIS ==========")


df_dim_diagnosis = df_icd \
    .select(
        col("icd_code").alias("diagnosis_code"),
        col("long_title").alias("diagnosis_description")
    ) \
    .filter(col("diagnosis_code").isNotNull()) \
    .dropDuplicates(["diagnosis_code"]) \
    .withColumn("diagnosis_sk", monotonically_increasing_id())
    
df_dim_diagnosis.write \
    .mode("overwrite") \
    .format("csv") \
    .save(f"{gold_path}/dim_diagnosis/")

print("========== CREATING DIM_DATE ==========")

df_dim_date = df_silver_visits \
    .select(col("visit_date").alias("full_date")) \
    .filter(col("full_date").isNotNull()) \
    .dropDuplicates(["full_date"]) \
    .withColumn("date_sk", monotonically_increasing_id()) \
    .withColumn("day", dayofmonth(col("full_date"))) \
    .withColumn("month", month(col("full_date"))) \
    .withColumn("quarter", quarter(col("full_date"))) \
    .withColumn("year", year(col("full_date")))

print(f"Dim_Date: {df_dim_date.count()} rows")
df_dim_date.write.mode("overwrite").csv(f"{gold_path}/dim_date/")

# Cell 4 - Create Fact Table
print("========== CREATING FACT_PATIENT_VISIT ==========")




gold_path = "abfss://sourcedata@saazurepractice077.dfs.core.windows.net/Gold/"

df_dim_patient = spark.read.parquet(f"{gold_path}/dim_patient/")
df_dim_date = spark.read.parquet(f"{gold_path}/dim_date/")
df_dim_diagnosis = spark.read.parquet(f"{gold_path}/dim_diagnosis/")

df_fact = df_silver_visits \
    .join(df_dim_patient.select("patient_id", "patient_sk"), "patient_id", "left") \
    .join(df_dim_date.select("full_date", "date_sk"), df_silver_visits["visit_date"] == df_dim_date["full_date"], "left") \
    .join(df_dim_diagnosis.select("diagnosis_code", "diagnosis_sk"), df_silver_visits["primary_icd_code"] == df_dim_diagnosis["diagnosis_code"], "left")

#Select final fact columns
df_fact_final = df_fact.select(
    col("visit_id"),
    col("patient_sk"),
    col("date_sk"),
    col("diagnosis_sk"),
    col("admission_type"),
    col("insurance"),
    col("admittime"),
    col("dischtime"),
    col("visit_date"),
    col("hospital_expire_flag").cast("int").alias("hospital_expire_flag"),
    lit(1).alias("visit_count")
) \
.withColumn("fact_sk", monotonically_increasing_id()) \
.dropDuplicates(["visit_id"])

print(f"Fact_Patient_Visit: {df_fact_final.count()} rows")

print("✅ Fact table created")

# ✅ Correct save
df_fact_final.write.mode("overwrite").csv(f"{gold_path}/fact_patient_visit/")
print("\n========== GOLD LAYER SUMMARY ==========\n")

# Cell 5 - Gold Summary
# Load Gold Tables
df_patient      = spark.read.format("delta").load(f"{gold_path}/dim_patient")
df_doctor       = spark.read.format("delta").load(f"{gold_path}/dim_doctor")
df_department   = spark.read.format("delta").load(f"{gold_path}/dim_department")
df_diagnosis    = spark.read.format("delta").load(f"{gold_path}/dim_diagnosis")
df_date         = spark.read.format("delta").load(f"{gold_path}/dim_date")
df_fact         = spark.read.format("delta").load(f"{gold_path}/fact_patient_visit")

# Counts
patient_count    = df_patient.count()
doctor_count     = df_doctor.count()
department_count = df_department.count()
diagnosis_count  = df_diagnosis.count()
date_count       = df_date.count()
fact_count       = df_fact.count()

# Print Summary
print(f"Dim_Patient:         {patient_count} rows")
print(f"Dim_Doctor:          {doctor_count} rows")
print(f"Dim_Department:      {department_count} rows")
print(f"Dim_Diagnosis:       {diagnosis_count} rows")
print(f"Dim_Date:            {date_count} rows")
print(f"Fact_Patient_Visit:  {fact_count} rows")

print("⭐ Star Schema Complete!")

#Cell 6 - Audit Table
print("========== CREATING PIPELINE AUDIT TABLE ==========")

# ✅ Read fact table from Gold (Fix)
df_fact_final = spark.read.csv(f"{gold_path}/fact_patient_visit/")

audit_data = [(
    str(spark.sql("SELECT current_timestamp()").collect()[0][0]),
    df_silver_patients.count(),
    df_silver_visits.count(),
    df_fact_final.count(),   # ✅ Now works
    275,
    0,
    0
)]

audit_schema = StructType([
    StructField("run_date", StringType(), True),
    StructField("bronze_count", IntegerType(), True),
    StructField("silver_count", IntegerType(), True),
    StructField("gold_count", IntegerType(), True),
    StructField("inserted_records", IntegerType(), True),
    StructField("updated_records", IntegerType(), True),
    StructField("expired_records", IntegerType(), True)
])

df_audit = spark.createDataFrame(audit_data, audit_schema)
df_audit.write.mode("append").parquet(f"{gold_path}/pipeline_audit/")

print("Audit table saved! ✅")
df_audit.show()

# Cell 7 - Watermark Table

print("========== CREATING WATERMARK ==========")

max_date = df_silver_visits \
    .filter(col("visit_date").isNotNull()) \
    .agg(max("visit_date").alias("last_processed_date")) \
    .collect()[0][0]

watermark_df = spark.createDataFrame([(
    "visits",
    str(max_date),
    str(current_timestamp())
)], [
    "table_name",
    "last_processed_date",
    "updated_at"
])

watermark_df.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(f"{gold_path}/pipeline_watermark/")

watermark_df.show()

print("✅ Watermark created")
